mnemonics.title: GAE Runtime Types
mnemonics.content: SAND FLEX - Standard And Flexible Environments. Standard is Sandboxed, Flexible uses Docker containers.

mnemonics.title: Scaling Types
mnemonics.content: AMB - Automatic, Manual, Basic scaling. Automatic for web traffic, Manual for fixed capacity, Basic for intermittent workloads.

mnemonics.title: Core Services
mnemonics.content: DMT CSUS - Datastore, Memcache, Task Queues, Cloud Storage, Search, Users API, Scheduler (Cron)
